features: ✅【GREAT EDUCATIONAL TOYS】Ranzah Educational Fidget Toy a versatile and engaging tool designed to enhance mathematical skills while providing sensory stimulation. This innovative toy features a unique push-pop bubble design that allows users to practice essential arithmetic operations such as addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. Crafted from high-quality silicone, the toy is not only durable but also safe for children and individuals with special needs. Its vibrant rainbow colors make it visually appealing, ensuring that learning remains fun and interactive for beginners..

✅{VERSATILE & TRAVEL FRIENDLY}-Designed with versatility in mind, this fidget toy is suitable for various settings, including classrooms and home use. Its compact size makes it easy to carry, allowing for on-the-go learning and play. Whether used as a teaching aid or a personal stress-relief tool, the Educational Fidget Toy is an invaluable addition to any educational toolkit. By combining fun and functionality, this toy not only fosters mathematical skills but also encourages mindfulness and focus, making it a must-have for beginners in math and sensory play.

✅【STRESS RELIEF】The Educational Fidget Toy serves as an excellent resource for educators and parents alike, promoting a hands-on approach to learning mathematics. Each bubble represents a mathematical operation, allowing users to physically engage with the concepts they are studying. This tactile experience can significantly enhance comprehension and retention, making it an ideal tool for young learners or those who may struggle with traditional teaching methods. Additionally, the sensory aspect of the toy provides a calming effect, making it a perfect stress reliever for individuals with anxiety or attention difficulties.

✅{USER - FRIENDLY SAFE TOY } Our fidget toys are made of 100% non-toxic, odorless Silicone and comply to all safety standards. It is easy to use this popit fidget toy set. Just press the bubbles down and they make a slight popping sound. The one who press the last bubble is the loser. Flip it over and start again. A continuous fun for all

✅ {PERFECT GIFT } -Our toys are small, light and bright, very suitable for children, teenagers, and adults. Ideal holiday gift/reward gift for your family and friends. Can be a meaningful gift for birthday party, rewards, educational tool, etc.
